title: TNT's Zombie Apocalypse
description: A simple, customizable, and vanilla friendly zombie apocalypse mod.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/tpiCtpRqk2Q" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This simple and customizable mod turns Minecraft into a zombie apocalypse while still being vanilla friendly! It feels more like a gamemode or minigame than a mod.

# Features
- Zombies no longer burn in daylight
- Zombies can spawn in daylight, but at a reduced rate (25% by default)
- Block light, such as torches, will still prevent zombie spawns
- All zombies can break doors in any difficulty
- Villagers are always zombified when they're killed by a zombie
- 90% of villages are abandoned and full of zombie villagers!

# Configurable
All of these features can be toggled in the config file, except the abandoned village rate, because it uses a datapack. However, you can disable the datapack on the world creation screen or use another one to override it (make sure it's higher on the list than the mod's datapack).

# Compatibility
The following mods have been tested with TNT's Zombie Apocalypse and are compatible:
- [TNT's Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/tnts-combat)
- [TNT's Harder Beds](https://modrinth.com/mod/tnts-harder-beds)
- [Beddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/beddium)

Testing with Optifine resulted in a crash on startup.
